bas_/Vault/System Config MOC
● EVERGREEN MOC dotfileshyprlandtheminglinuxmoc

System Config MOC

Hub for system configuration notes — Hyprland stack, theming engine, editor, shell.

PLANTED · 27 APRIL 2026 · MAP OF CONTENT

Reference index for ~/dotfiles (stowed). One note per config. Edits flow through ~/dotfiles → git → stow symlinks.

Stack

  • WM — Hyprland Config
  • Bar — Waybar Config
  • Launcher — Wofi Config
  • Terminal — Kitty Config
  • Editor — Neovim Config
  • Multiplexer — Tmuxinator Config
  • Notifications — Swaync Config
  • Lock / Idle — Hyprlock Config · Hypridle Config

Theming

  • Theme Engine — variable injection via envsubst + pywal sync
  • Theme Switcher Script — switch.sh / select.sh

Scripts & Utilities

  • Custom Scripts — windowSwitch.sh, media.py
  • Htop Config
  • AIMP Config

Workflow

  • Dotfiles Repo Workflow — bare repo + Stow

Hyprland deep-dives

  • Hyprland Keybinds
  • Hyprland Plugins
↑ Vault All notes
